parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'error', message: $json.error?.message || 'Processing failed', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ "INSERT INTO audit.error_log (report_type, file_name, error_type, error_message, error_detail) VALUES ('unknown', 'unknown', 'workflow_error', '" + ($json.error?.message || 'Unknown error').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + ($json.error?.stack || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "')" }}
